_meta.author: scorecard-refine-national cron (Adam Johns)
_meta.note: Federal AZ-06 batch — Ciscomani (R incumbent, Cook toss-up) vs. Mendoza (D, sole remaining challenger after field collapse). Currency wins: BUMA WITHDREW 2025-12-19 (FBI whistleblower under federal indictment, legally barred from AZ); DONAT WITHDREW 2025-09-09 (financial); WEEKS still on ballot per Ballotpedia but zero public footprint. Heterodox catches: Ciscomani heterodox-R YEAs on Ukraine aid + IRA-credit-defense + bipartisan Dreamer-protection bill (America's CHILDREN Act); Mendoza heterodox-D anti-AIPAC (J Street + End Citizens United endorsed, $0 AIPAC) + Iran-restraint.

set.office: U.S. Representative AZ-06 (R incumbent — 2nd term; 2026 re-election, Cook toss-up; opponent JoAnna Mendoza-D)

profile.confidence_note: 2026-06-04 — federal evidence sweep replacing maga_conservative_r party-default. Deep roll-call record (119th + 118th Cong) + Heritage Action 83% (119th) + JBS Freedom Index 58% (119th cum 48%) + SBA Pro-Life A+ + NRA-PVF A + Gun Owners B+ + AIPAC $1,139,752 (lifetime, FALSE on foreign q4). MULTIPLE HETERODOX-R DEVIATIONS captured: (1) YEA on H.R.8035 Ukraine Security Supplemental (April 2024) listed on Republicans-for-Ukraine; (2) signed joint-letter w/ 20 House Rs DEFENDING IRA clean-energy tax credits, opposed full IRA repeal; (3) co-led bipartisan 'America's CHILDREN Act' (Documented Dreamers) w/ Krishnamoorthi (D) + Bera (D) — amnesty-adjacent; (4) only AZ-R YES on Nov 2023 stopgap CR that toppled McCarthy; voted YES on 6 CRs; (5) publicly rejects federal abortion ban, supports rape/incest/life-of-mother exceptions; (6) pro-Iran-strike posture: 'world is a safer place' (AZPM 5/4/2026). Bioguide C001133 — sworn Jan 3 2023, so RFMA (2022) and Jan 2021 cert votes are N/A.
profile.background: U.S. Representative AZ-06 (Tucson + SE AZ), sworn Jan 3 2023. Born Hermosillo, Mexico; legal immigrant. Former Senior Advisor to Gov. Doug Ducey (AZ) on regional & international affairs. Wife Laura, four children. 14 years on board of Patriot Academy (biblical-worldview civic training — Rick Green / David Barton).

juan-ciscomani.notes_set: AZ-06 R INCUMBENT — Cook toss-up vs Mendoza-D. Deep voting record + heterodox patterns. HARD TRUEs (cited): SBA A+ + Born-Alive HR21 cosponsor/YEA + defund-PP via OBBB reconciliation; HR28 Women in Sports cosponsor/YEA + HR3492 Protect Children's Innocence (gender-care minors); ECCA cosponsor (HR531 118th + HR833 119th); Patriot Academy board 14yr; NRA-PVF A + Gun Owners B+ + HR38 Concealed Carry Reciprocity cosponsor; SAVE Act HR22 YEA; Laken Riley HR29/S5 cosponsor/YEA; OBBB extends TCJA + no tax on tips + child credit; ATR Taxpayer Protection Pledge signer; Heritage 83%. HARD FALSEs (cited heterodox-R): foreign q0 Ukraine HR8035 YEA + 'Republicans for Ukraine' listed; foreign q1 NAY on H.Con.Res.38 Iran War Powers (Roll Call 85 6/3/2026) + pro-Iran-strike statements; foreign q4 AIPAC $1,139,752; econ q0 OBBB (HR1) YEA = $700B deficit add per CBO + 6 CR YEAs; econ q4 signed joint letter DEFENDING IRA clean-energy credits; border q2 co-led bipartisan America's CHILDREN Act protecting Documented Dreamers w/ Krishnamoorthi-D + Bera-D; christian_liberty q2 voted/op-ed for entangling US in Israel aid + Iran strikes; industry q3 AIPAC top PAC donor + leadership PAC #2/#3 2024. NULL where no evidence found (do NOT infer from party). RFMA + Jan 6 certification = N/A pre-tenure.

set.office: U.S. Representative AZ-06 (2026 D nominee · sole remaining Democrat after Buma/Donat/Severson/Swallow/Goldman all withdrew · vs Ciscomani-R · Cook toss-up · primary 7/21/2026)

profile.confidence_note: 2026-06-04 — federal evidence sweep on AZ-06 D nominee. Marine combat vet + Red Rock Elementary school board member + 2 Iraq tours + Afghanistan + USMC Gunnery Sgt. CROSS-PARTY DEVIATIONS captured: (1) NO AIPAC money (TrackAIPAC clean) + J Street PAC endorsement = anti-AIPAC posture aligns with rubric foreign q4; (2) Iran war restraint — 'United States should not be drawn into another protracted Middle East conflict' (Tucson Spotlight) = TRUE on foreign q1; (3) End Citizens United endorsement (anti-dark-money) = TRUE on industry q3. STANDARD-PROGRESSIVE positions (cited HARD FALSE): Reproductive Freedom for All endorsement (11/13/2025) + EMILY's List 'fearless pro-choice champion'; LGBTQ+ Victory Fund + Equality PAC + LPAC endorsements (self-IDs bisexual cisgender woman, she/her); GIFFORDS endorsement w/ stated commitments to universal background checks + safe-storage + ghost-gun regulation; opposes Trump tax cuts; 'stand down' on ICE operations (Daily Signal 5/6/2026). Religion: NOT DISCLOSED in any reviewed source — null. Bio confirmed against BOLD PAC + Tucson Sentinel profile.
profile.religion: Unknown — no public statement of faith located
profile.background: U.S. Navy 1994-97; USMC 1998-2016 (Gunnery Sgt., drill instructor, MCOCS instructor, SAPR SNCO); 2 tours Iraq + 1 Afghanistan. BA American Military Univ (2013); MA Grand Canyon Univ (2019). Governing Board, Red Rock Elementary School District (Pinal County). Career: veterans outreach (Pima CC); constituent services for Rep. Tom O'Halleran (D); Exec Dir, AZ Center for Economic Progress; founder Poderoza Strategies; Exec Dir, VetsForward. Latina, daughter of two immigrant farmworkers, raised in Eloy AZ. Self-IDs as bisexual cisgender woman (she/her). Single mother to 9-year-old son. 2026-Q1 fundraising: $5.34M raised / $3.5M COH (FEC H6AZ06099).

joanna-mendoza.notes_set: AZ-06 D NOMINEE — sole remaining D challenger (Buma/Donat/Severson/Swallow/Goldman all withdrew by Jan 2026). Marine combat vet · 9 years on local school board. CROSS-PARTY DEVIATIONS (cited TRUE): foreign q1 Iran restraint (Tucson Spotlight); foreign q4 NO AIPAC money + J Street endorsed; industry q3 End Citizens United (anti-dark-money). STANDARD-D HARD FALSEs (cited): sanctity q0-q3 Reproductive Freedom for All + EMILY's List endorsements; marriage q0-q3 LGBTQ+ Victory Fund + Equality PAC + LPAC endorsements (self-IDs bisexual); family q2 progressive-gender alignment (2020 sex-work-for-trans-youth quote); econ q0 'stop giving tax cuts to the rich' + opposes Trump tax cuts; econ q4 pro-clean-energy investment (no IRA-repeal stance); border q1 called Laken-Riley-style mass detention 'insane' + 'stand down for ICE' (Daily Signal 5/6/2026); border q4 pro-DACA framing; self_defense q0 GIFFORDS endorsement w/ universal background checks + safe storage + ghost gun regulation; self_defense q4 anti-2A posture. set.office: U.S. Representative AZ-06 (WITHDREW 2025-12-19 · ex-FBI counterintelligence whistleblower under federal indictment, legally barred from physically campaigning in AZ)

profile.confidence_note: 2026-06-04 — federal evidence sweep. HIGH-VALUE CURRENCY WIN: candidate WITHDREW 2025-12-19 per Gila Valley Central. AZ Free News (Jan 2026) confirms: 'Severson and Buma withdraw from CD6 race leaving Ciscomani with one Democrat challenger.' Per CHALLENGER protocol the rubric is short-circuited — fix the status (THAT is the real win), record what positions are documented, move on. Almost all federal-rubric cells legitimately NULL: pre-withdrawal he made only narrow public statements on executive power / civil liberties (anti-Trump-admin framing of border militarization + 'Orwellian surveillance nightmare' warning). The heterodox-libertarian angle his whistleblower bio suggests does NOT materialize — his complaint was about FBI suppression of investigations, i.e. wanted MORE investigation not less surveillance. Background: 16-yr FBI Russian-counterintel; arrested 3/17/2025 at JFK on charges of illegally disclosing confidential FBI information; bond conditions restrict him to Central Dist of California + Utah (= legally barred from AZ campaign trail).
profile.background: 16-year FBI Special Agent (Russian counterintelligence). July 2023 Senate Judiciary Committee statement alleging FBI suppression of Hunter Biden + Giuliani-as-Russian-asset investigations. FBI raid Nov 13 2023; arrested at JFK March 17 2025 attempting to board international flight; charged with illegally disclosing confidential FBI source information (~130 files). Bond conditions restrict him to Central District of California + Utah + points between. Filed AZ-06 Statement of Interest 4/28/2025 (FEC C00903666). Pivoting to Project Lost & Found – Voices of Gratitude humanitarian work.

johnathan-buma.notes_set: AZ-06 2026 D PRIMARY — WITHDREW 2025-12-19 (Gila Valley Central, AZ Free News). Withdrew citing 'better directed outside electoral politics' — context: bond conditions from March 2025 federal indictment for FBI source-information disclosure legally barred him from physically campaigning in Arizona. Pre-withdrawal public statements limited to anti-Trump-admin framing on border militarization + civil-liberties warnings ('police state or Orwellian surveillance nightmare'). No documented positions on abortion / marriage / parental rights / religious liberty / taxes / voter ID / Laken Riley / E-Verify / 2A / Ukraine / Iran / AIPAC / pharma / Big Tech — all NULL per evidence-first discipline. Currency-fix IS the high-value win — record exits active queue.

set.office: U.S. Representative AZ-06 (WITHDREW 2025-09-09 · suspended campaign citing 'financial realities of the race')

profile.confidence_note: 2026-06-04 — federal evidence sweep. HIGH-VALUE CURRENCY WIN: candidate SUSPENDED campaign 2025-09-09 per Herald Review + Gila Valley Central + Tucson Sentinel. Field collapse confirmed by AZ Free News (Jan 2026). Per CHALLENGER protocol: status fix is the real win. Pre-withdrawal documented platform was conventional progressive-D (Medicare-for-All, ranked-choice voting, House expansion, campaign-finance reform, anti-OBBB on debt grounds but paired with pro-spending priorities). One soft heterodox flag: full-time employee of Raytheon Technologies (precision control actuation systems) — defense-contractor industry tie unusual for D challenger, though campaign too small to attract defense-PAC money. Most rubric cells legitimately NULL.
profile.background: 42 at filing; first-time candidate. Born/raised Shaker Heights OH (Cleveland suburb). BS Mechanical Engineering, University of Arizona. Career: industrial automation → medical devices (Roche Tissue Dynamics / Ventana HE600 cancer diagnostics, AGM Container, solar startup work in Boston/SF, wheelchair lifts, peptide synthesizers). Currently precision control actuation systems designer at Raytheon Technologies. Mentored UA senior design projects 10+ years.

chris-donat.notes_set: AZ-06 2026 D PRIMARY — WITHDREW 2025-09-09 citing 'financial realities of the race' (Herald Review, Gila Valley Central, Tucson Sentinel). Pre-withdrawal platform: Medicare-for-All, federal green-energy/affordable-housing spending, ranked-choice voting, expanding U.S. House, campaign-finance reform. Opposed OBBB on debt-growth grounds BUT paired with pro-spending priorities = not a fiscal-conservative stance. Soft industry flag: full-time Raytheon Technologies employee (defense contractor) while running as D — campaign too small to attract defense-PAC money. No public positions found on abortion, marriage, parental rights, religious liberty, immigration, 2A, foreign policy. Currency-fix exits record from active queue.

profile.background: 2026 AZ-06 Democratic primary candidate (Tucson area / SE Arizona). Listed on Ballotpedia and OpenCampaign as 'Carter Jordan Weeks' (candidateranking.com). Minor candidate: no verifiable campaign website, no FEC committee filing on the AZ-06 2026 page, no completed candidate questionnaires, no fundraising total reported. Primary field also includes JoAnna Mendoza (D nominee, $5.34M raised) plus Iman Bah ($195 raised). Incumbent Juan Ciscomani (R) raised $5.08M. Primary 7/21/2026; general 11/3/2026.
